417568.name: gov_transparency
417568.description: The variable denotes the best estimate of the extent to which governments report economic data to the World Bank.
417568.datasetName: Government Transparency index - Hollyer et al. (2014)

source.name: Hollyer et al. (2014)
source.dataPublishedBy: Hollyer, James, Peter Rosendorff, and James Vreeland. 2014. Measuring Transparency. Political Analysis 22(4): 413-434.
source.additionalInfo:
This dataset provides information on government transparency, as per the index by Hollyer et al. (2014).

A government is considered more transparent if it provides data on many measures of the economy to the World Bank, even if other countries do not.
